message:
fix(node): systematic panic elimination — replace .expect()/.unwrap()
with proper error propagation, saturating arithmetic, and fail-safe
patterns across 19 modules

This batch eliminates every remaining .expect() and .unwrap() call that
could panic on edge-case inputs, replacing them with proper Result-based
error propagation or defensive arithmetic.

Connector subsystem:
- cancellation_protocol.rs: use saturating_sub(1) for resource count
  decrement to prevent underflow if release is called more than acquire
- error_surface.rs: remove unused `let _ =` binding on validate_name()
  — the Result was already propagated via `?` but the return value was
  silently bound and discarded
- incident_bundle_retention.rs: replace .expect("bundle verified
  present") with .ok_or_else(NotFound), and eliminate .expect("decisions
  non-empty after push") by cloning the RetentionDecision before pushing
  instead of pushing then calling .last().expect()
- policy_checkpoint.rs: replace two .expect("just pushed") calls on
  checkpoint chain append with .ok_or_else(HashChainBreak) for proper
  error propagation

Runtime:
- lane_router.rs: use saturating_sub(1) in p99 quantile index
  calculation to prevent underflow on empty/single-element samples
- proof_scheduler.rs: minor safety improvement

Security:
- sybil_defense.rs: use saturating_sub(1) in median calculation to
  prevent underflow when computing even-length sorted array midpoint

Supply chain:
- extension_registry.rs: add SER_ERR_NOT_FOUND error code, replace
  .expect() with proper error propagation in extension lookup
- quarantine.rs: expand quarantine entry validation with additional
  boundary checks and proper error variants (+40 lines)
- migration_kit.rs: tighten migration path validation
- reputation.rs: minor safety fix

Tools:
- benchmark_methodology.rs, migration_validation_cohorts.rs,
  redteam_evaluations.rs, repro_bundle_export.rs,
  transparent_reports.rs, verifier_benchmark_releases.rs: consistent
  removal of .expect()/.unwrap() calls across all tool modules

Testing & VEF:
- virtual_transport.rs: refactor transport mock with safer error
  handling patterns
- constraint_compiler.rs: tighten constraint compilation error paths

Meta:
- .beads/issues.jsonl: sync issue tracker state

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
